problem_relevance.description: Importance and clarity of the problem, task, or opportunity.

innovation.description: Novelty, differentiation, and advancement of the category.

function.description: Fitness for purpose, usability, efficiency, and safety.

form.description: Aesthetics, execution, materials, finish, and formal coherence.

user_experience.description: Emotional appeal, accessibility, comfort, and user benefit.

feasibility.description: Technical, economic, production, and implementation realism.

responsibility.description: Environmental responsibility, durability, ethics, and safety.

social_impact.description: Benefit to society, culture, communities, and underserved groups.

business_value.description: Market relevance, brand value, economic benefit, and scalability.

technical_quality.description: Engineering quality, technology integration, and evidence of performance.

rule: Always present the award's official criteria. Normalized dimensions are for comparison only.
